text:
3G = Drug Therapy Unchanged 
3H = Follow-Up/Report 
3J = Patient Referral 
3K = Instructions Understood 
3M = Compliance Aid Provided 
3N = Medication Administered 
Null/missing = Source value is missing or unknown 

COMMENT: This Result of Service Code is data element 441-E6 of the NCPDP data dictionary. It is one of three 
fields concatenated into the drug utilization code field (DRUG_UTLZTN_CD) in this file. ^ Back to TOC ^
